# HookTap

> HookTap is an iOS, macOS, and Windows app that receives HTTP POST webhook requests and delivers them as real-time push notifications to your devices. No server, no registration, ready in under 2 minutes.

## What is HookTap?

HookTap turns any device into a real-time webhook receiver. When an external service (GitHub, Stripe, Zapier, n8n, Make, Grafana, etc.) sends an HTTP POST request to your personal HookTap URL, the app instantly delivers it as a push notification to your iPhone, Mac, or Windows PC.

**Core value:** One URL. One POST. Done. No server to maintain, no bot to configure, no team account required.

## Key Facts

- **Type**: Developer tool / webhook notification app
- **Platforms**: iOS 16+, macOS 13+, Windows 10+
- **Hosting**: EU-hosted in Berlin, Germany (GDPR compliant)
- **Pricing**: Free forever (1 webhook), Pro from $0.99/month or $24.99 lifetime
- **Website**: https://hooktap.me
- **App Store**: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6759625475
- **No account required**: Anonymous account created automatically on first launch

## How It Works

1. Download the HookTap iOS app from the App Store
2. Copy your personal webhook URL (shown immediately in the app)
3. Add the URL to any service that can send HTTP POST requests
4. Receive push notifications within seconds

## Features

- Real-time push notifications from any HTTP POST
- Home screen and lock screen widgets showing the latest event
- Live Activity and Dynamic Island support
- Full event feed with payload inspection and history
- JSON field mapping (connect GitHub, Stripe, Vercel, etc.)
- Up to 10 webhooks with custom names, icons, and colors
- Webhook sharing with teammates via 8-character invite codes (15-min TTL)
- Desktop apps for macOS and Windows (sync via 6-digit code)
- No server, no registration, no password

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Features |
|---|---|---|
| Free | $0 forever | 1 webhook URL, push notifications, 20 events |
| Pro Monthly | $0.99/month | 500 events, widgets, Live Activity, JSON Mapping, 10 webhooks, Mac & Windows |
| Pro Lifetime | $24.99 one-time | Everything in Pro, all future updates |

## Integrations

Works with any service that can send HTTP POST requests, including:
GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Bitbucket Pipelines, Zapier, n8n, Make (Integromat), Vercel, Stripe, Grafana, PagerDuty, Home Assistant, cURL, Node.js, Python, and more.

## Comparison

| | HookTap | Discord/Slack Webhooks | ntfy.sh | Email Alerts |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Purpose-built for webhooks | ✅ | ❌ | ⚠️ | ❌ |
| Full payload inspection | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| No account needed | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Native iOS/macOS/Windows | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Webhook history/log | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| EU-hosted, GDPR | ✅ | ❌ | ⚠️ | ⚠️ |
| Self-hostable | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ |

## Privacy & Compliance

- All data stored on servers in Berlin, Germany
- Protected by EU GDPR
- Webhook URLs are cryptographically unique — not guessable
- No email, no password, no personal data required to use the app
- Account and all data can be permanently deleted at any time

## Common Use Cases

- CI/CD pipeline completed → iPhone push notification
- Stripe payment received → instant alert
- Server downtime or error → push to on-call developer
- Grafana alert triggered → notification to iPhone
- Zapier/n8n/Make automation finished → confirmation push
- Smart home event → personal notification
- Cron job completed → status push

## Languages

Available in English and German. Website: https://hooktap.me/en (English), https://hooktap.me/de (German).

## Optional

- Blog: https://hooktap.me/en/blog
- Developer Guide: https://hooktap.me/en/dev
